channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gunfire reported near White House Saturday night
item.description: Gunshots were heard near the White House on Saturday night, according to multiple reporters on the grounds at the time. The incident, which...

item.title: Exclusive: Details of the Iran deal Trump is nearing
item.description: The emerging U.S.-Iran agreement includes a 60-day ceasefire extension and reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: U.S. and Iran close to reaching war-ending deal, official says
item.description: President Trump stated Saturday that a deal to end the Iran war would be announced soon, with final negotiations underway.

item.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran deal is "50/50," decision by Sunday
item.description: President Trump told Axios he would meet negotiators to discuss Iran's latest offer and likely decide by Sunday.
